title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates Capital India are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates Capital India:
Prestige Estates Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
